title: ventilago pubiflora
intro: Ventilago pubiflora, also known as the Chinese ironwood or iron tree, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The leaves and bark of Ventilago pubiflora have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, offering health benefits such as pain relief, improved digestion, and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea, decoction, or tincture, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
